creator: web@umich.edu
text:
I am running 13.2-STABLE and found that audio/audacity
needed updating on 11/24/2023.  Using portmaster I had
a compile time failure when x11-toolkits/wxgtk32 failed
to build.  I think it was a dependency on audacity.

So I cannot update audacity until I can resolve the
problem with x11-toolkits/wxgtk32.  There was a recent
bug report for this port involving NLS, but I tried
to compile x11-toolkits/wxgtk32 with or without NLS
selected using "make config" and it failer either way.

Can someone suggest what I should try next?  Thanks.

.
